projects.name: Network Management System Development
projects.description: Developed an internal network management system to monitor, alert for unauthorized connections and critical device errors. Analyzed and handled unauthorized connection alerts, ensured internal network security. Built automated reports on network status and incidents for maintenance.

projects.name: Network Model Design and Deployment
projects.description: Designed and deployed a network model for a medium-sized enterprise. Implemented routing protocols and network security to enhance information safety. Selected and configured network devices like routers, switches to ensure performance and stability.
